reviews.review_description:
Project: Nova delivers a refreshing escape-style experience set in space. The realization is solid, with a clear sense of continuity in the storyline that keeps you engaged from one objective to the next.

Gameplay is nicely varied: solving technical space problems, floating in zero gravity, grabbing onto surfaces, unsoldering components, and interacting with your environment in meaningful ways. The zero-G movement especially adds a great sense of immersion.

Graphics are very decent for an indie game, the mechanics are well executed, and the overall experience feels polished and cohesive. A solid sci-fi title that stands out in the VR space genre.
It's a pretty good game I enjoy the graphics and puzzles. I don't like that your hands go through everything,  but that's it the game is pretty good 👍
